title: IT Security Intern
description:
Summer 2026 IT Internship: IT Security Intern (1 Position)
Location: Mesa, AZ Office
Department: IT Operations
Pay: $20/hourly
Duration: Monday May 18th through Friday August 7th (12 weeks)
Hours: 30 Hours Weekly
Are you passionate about cybersecurity and excited to help protect an enterprise environment from real-world threats? Join Flex Technology Group as an IT Security Intern, where you’ll gain hands-on experience in security operations, threat awareness, and vulnerability management—all while contributing to our organization’s security posture.
This is a high-impact role designed for students who want to understand the fundamentals of cybersecurity and play an active part in elevating user awareness and reducing risk.
What You’ll Do
You’ll support core security functions and help strengthen our company’s security culture.
Daily Responsibilities:
Assist with security awareness training efforts
Perform alert analysis and help evaluate potential threats
Conduct vulnerability scans and review findings with the team
Collaborate with IT Security professionals to support daily security operations
Projects & Assignments:
Contribute to and enhance the company-wide Security Awareness Program
Develop materials and ideas to help increase engagement and improve results
Expected Outcomes:
Increased engagement and success metrics within the security awareness program
Hands-on understanding of a security analyst’s role in an enterprise
Positive improvements in behavior-based security metrics
What You Bring
Required:
Systems:
Windows
Linux
Networking:
DHCP
DNS
VLANs
Routing
Preferred:
Antivirus tools
Cloud compute solutions
Vulnerability scanning
Identity and access management
Incident response
CCNA
Security+
Google Cybersecurity Certificate
SSCP
Education:
Currently pursuing a degree in Cybersecurity, Information Technology, or a related field
Training & Onboarding
Access to all security tool learning portals
Hands-on exposure to core security tools and practices
Direct support and guidance from IT Security leadership
Additional Learning Opportunities:
EDR (Endpoint Detection & Response)
Zero Trust frameworks
WAF (Web Application Firewall)
Rapid7 Platform
Patch Management
Email Gateway security
How You’ll Be Evaluated
Your growth and learning will be supported with structured feedback and clear performance measures.
Evaluation Criteria:
Increased success rate and decreased fail/miss rates in Hoxhunt awareness campaigns
Engagement, initiative, and accuracy in daily assignments
Feedback & Check-Ins:
Weekly check-ins and progress reviews with mentor
Monthly check-in with manager
Open communication channels for support and guidance
Why This Internship Matters
Cybersecurity is one of the most in-demand fields and this internship gives you real-world experience, real tools, and real responsibility. You’ll strengthen your technical foundation, sharpen your analytical skills, and directly contribute to building a stronger, safer FlexTG.
Ready to start your cybersecurity journey?
Apply today and help protect what powers FlexTG.
